title: JustSomeTranslations
body:
[![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a195fe247439e9bc0fc02b85bb3e17fa792da484.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/just-some-translations-to-russian/)
# JustSomeTranslations
### **Перевод на русский для модов**
Например [voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [Cactus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cactus)
<details>
<summary>Моды</summary>

1. [Auto Clicker](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoclicker)
2. [BindCommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/bindcommands)
3. [Block Meter](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockmeter)
4. [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view/)
5. [Compact Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-chat)
6. [Container Searcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/container-searcher)
7. [Elytra Pitch](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytrapitch)
8. [Elytra Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytratime)
9. [Flow](https://modrinth.com/mod/flow)
10. [Fluid Void Fading](https://modrinth.com/mod/fluidvoidfading)
11. [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgeconfigapiport)
12. [Inventory Tabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-tabs)
13. [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)
14. [Jump Over Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/jumpoverfences)
15. [Just Enough Professions (JEP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jep)
16. [Mob Health Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobhealthbar)
17. [Notebook](https://modrinth.com/mod/notebook)
21. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
41. [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

</details>

![getero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/319e2d13b23cfce1ef98c9fd09d7492bcd26e450_0.webp)
